Richo Darma AgiThruline Studio · Narrative Post-Productionrichodarma@gmail.com
Editorial Philosophy
Most editors cut footage.
I shape stories.
9 years across feature film, documentary, NGO, and long-form digital content — distilled into one focused discipline: the craft of making stories hold.
I work at the intersection of long-form essay video and documentary. The two formats where pacing is an argument. Where a single cut changes what an audience believes. Where the difference between a good video and a great one is almost never technical.
What I bring that most editors don't: narrative consultation before I touch the timeline. Structure first. Then the edit.
Narrative First
Structure before scissors. Every project begins with story logic — not a timeline.
Depth Over Speed
Long-form is a discipline. We don't rush what needs to breathe.
Editorial Intelligence
The real product is thinking. The edit is how it gets expressed.
Richo Darma AgiThruline Studio · Narrative Post-Productionrichodarma@gmail.com
Long-Form Essay Video · Case Study 01 · Featured
Dr. Jonathan Tam
Educational Essay Channel · Planaria Studio
Senior Video Editor
▶ Watch on YouTube
The Brief
Adapt complex financial and educational scripts into high-retention long-form essay videos for a Western English-speaking audience. Balance information density with visual storytelling to keep AVD strong across 15–40 minute videos.
The Editorial Challenge
Educational content fails when it becomes a lecture. The editor's job is to make the argument feel like a discovery — pacing the reveal so the audience stays curious, not passive.
The Approach
Built the editing rhythm around the script's argument structure. Motion graphics designed to clarify data. Sound design used to punctuate key moments and sustain attention across long runtimes.
Project Details
ClientDr. Jonathan Tam
StudioPlanaria Studio
FormatLong-form essay video
Length15–40 min per video
MarketGlobal · English
RoleSenior Video Editor
PipelineFull post-production
Why this matters for Thruline Studio
This is exactly the client Thruline is built for — a serious creator in the educational essay space who needs an editor who understands information density, retention mechanics, and narrative flow simultaneously.
Richo Darma AgiThruline Studio · Narrative Post-Productionrichodarma@gmail.com
Short-Form Social Content · Case Study 02
eToro Australia
TikTok & Reels Social Content · A-Leagues Partnership
Senior Video Editor
▶ Watch on TikTok @etoro_au
The Brief
Create short-form social content for eToro Australia's TikTok and Reels channels around their A-Leagues football sponsorship. Branded entertainment that feels native to the platform — not like an ad.
The Challenge
Short-form for sports sponsorship has to be genuinely engaging, not just branded. The edit needed to earn attention in the first 2 seconds — in a feed full of professional sports content.
The Approach
Hook-first cuts designed around platform-native formats — challenge content, trivia, on-field activations. Energy pacing calibrated to TikTok's scroll behaviour while keeping eToro's brand tone credible.
Project Details
ClienteToro Australia
StudioPlanaria Studio
FormatTikTok · Reels · Shorts
ContextA-Leagues sponsorship
MarketAustralia
RoleSenior Video Editor
Note on short-form work
Short-form is not Thruline Studio's focus — but the ability to cut across formats from 30-second TikToks to 60-minute essays is what makes the editorial range real, not theoretical.

Digital Film Series · Case Study 03
Viking Film Shorts
Cross-Cultural Short Film Series · YouTube · 1.7M Views
Supervising Editor / Creative Lead
▶ Watch Viking Film Shorts
The Challenge
Launch a new film IP targeting Indonesia, Australia, and Malaysia simultaneously — no franchise history, no marketing budget. The editing style had to function as the brand itself.
The Editorial Problem
Cross-cultural storytelling cannot rely on dialogue or cultural shorthand. The edit needed to carry all emotional meaning through rhythm, pacing, and structure alone.
The Result
1.7 million organic views and 8,000+ subscribers built from zero. The editing style became the brand — proof that a consistent editorial voice outperforms any marketing strategy.
Project Details
ClientViking Sunset Studios
FormatShort Film Series
PlatformYouTube
RoleSupervising Editor
MarketsID · AU · MY
1.7M
Organic views
8K+
Subscribers from zero

Brand Documentary · Case Study 04
Hyatt Regency Bali
50th Anniversary Documentary · Global Distribution
Director & Editor
▶ Watch the Documentary
The Brief
Commissioned by Hyatt to direct and produce a landmark documentary celebrating 50 years of their iconic Bali property. Full creative and editorial control from pre-production through final delivery.
Narrative Challenge
50 years of institutional history contains dozens of potential stories. The editorial work began before the shoot — finding the single throughline that would make a global audience feel something personal.
The Result
Distributed across all official Hyatt channels — in-hotel TV, global social media, websites, and YouTube. A film built to outlast any campaign.
Project Details
ClientHyatt Regency Bali
FormatBrand Documentary
RoleDirector & Editor
DistributionGlobal · All channels
Year2024
Why this matters
Brands with heritage hire editors who can find the story — not just shoot it. Hyatt trusted the editorial judgment from day one.
Richo Darma AgiThruline Studio · Narrative Post-Productionrichodarma@gmail.com
NGO Impact Documentary · Case Study 05
Scholars of Sustenance
Long-Form Impact Documentary Series · Bali & Java
Head of Video Production
▶ Watch Documentary Series
The Brief
Built the video production function from scratch for a food-rescue NGO operating across Bali and Java. Sole editor, strategist, and producer for 2 years — responsible for every video that touched donors, partners, and the public.
Narrative Challenge
NGO content must document truth and move people to act simultaneously. The editorial challenge: make the audience feel agency, not guilt. One wrong cut and the film becomes either propaganda or journalism — neither raises money.
The Result
Fundraising campaigns that directly influenced donor decisions. High-stakes content where the edit had measurable impact on how much people chose to give.
Project Details
ClientScholars of Sustenance
FormatImpact Documentary Series
RoleHead of Video Production
Duration2 yrs · 2020–2022
GeographyBali · Java
